details.effect: [evolve][cost02]: Evolve this follower. [feed][cost01]: Race this follower. Storm.
Storm. On Evolve: Select an enemy follower on the field and put it on top of its owner's deck.

[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. [fanfare] Return any number of other Umamusume cards on your field to their owners' hands: Deal X damage to each enemy follower on the field. X equals 2 times the number of cards returned.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. [fanfare] Recover 3 play points. While there are at least 8 cards on the field, this follower has Storm.
Choose one of the following. (1) Search your deck for a follower with Storm, reveal it, and add it to your hand. (2) Select a follower with Storm on your field and give it [attack]+3.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. [fanfare] Look at the top card of your deck. You may put it on the bottom of your deck.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. On Race: Give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1. Select up to 1 enemy follower on the field and return it to its owner's hand.
[fanfare] Draw a card. When this card leaves the field, select an Umamusume follower on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. [fanfare] Return another card on your field to its owner's hand: Give your leader [defense]+2.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. Ward. [fanfare] Return another card on your field to its owner's hand: Give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. Rush. Assail. [fanfare] Select another card on your field and return it to its owner's hand.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. When this card is returned to hand from your field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. On Race: Give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1. For the rest of this turn, this follower doesn't take damage.

[evolve][cost02]: Evolve this follower. [feed][cost01]: Race this follower. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it X damage. X equals 2 times the number of followers on your field, including this one.
Storm.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. Bane. Ward. Aura. [act][engage]: Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. Storm. [fanfare] If there is a Trial Initiation and Narita Taishin in your cemetery, give this follower [attack]+3/[defense]+1.
Select a follower on your field. Give it Storm and, if it's an Umamusume follower, [attack]+1/[defense]+1.

[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. On Race: Give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1. Select up to 1 other follower on your field and refresh it. For the rest of this turn, that follower can't attack enemies.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. Rush. [fanfare][cost03]: Search your deck for an Umamusume follower that costs 3 play points and put it onto your field.

Choose one of the following. (1) Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal an Umamusume card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order. (2) Select a BNW follower in your cemetery and add it to your hand.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. Bane.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. Rush.

On Evolve: Select a spell in your cemetery and add it to your hand. Whenever you play a spell, select an enemy follower on the field and give it [attack]-1/[defense]-1.

[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. [fanfare] Search your deck for an Umamusume spell, reveal it, and add it to your hand. While this card is on your field, the 1st Umamusume spell you play each turn costs 1 less to play. When you play a spell, if it's your 3rd this turn, select an Umamusume follower on your field. Give it and this follower Storm.

If there is a Daiwa Scarlet on your field, this card costs 2 less to play. [feed][cost01]: Race this follower. Once per turn, when you play a spell, give each Umamusume follower on your field [attack]+1/[defense]+1 and Rush.
[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. If there is an Umamusume card on your field, deal 4 damage instead.

[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. Whenever another one of your followers races, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a spell or amulet from among them and add it to your hand. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. On Race: Draw a card, then discard a card.
[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. If there is a racing follower on your field, deal 3 damage instead.

[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. [act][engage]: Select a spell that costs 2 play points or less in your hand and put it into your EX area. For the rest of this turn, it costs 0 play points to play.

Shuffle your deck, then reveal the top 6 cards. You may put any number of Umamusume followers or Umamusume amulets from among them onto your field. Add the remaining cards to your hand.

At the start of your main phase, roll a 6-sided die. If you roll a 1, deal 5 damage to your leader. If you roll a 2, 3, 4, or 5, draw a card. If you roll a 6, give your leader [defense]+3 and destroy this card.

[fanfare] Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs an odd number of play points, deal 2 damage to each enemy leader. If it costs an even number of play points, deal 2 damage to your leader.
Ward. [fanfare] Select an Umamusume follower on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+2.
You can serve a Carrot to an Umamusume follower to race it. (Racing followers have Rush.) ---------- You can put up to 10 of this card into your evolve deck.

[feed][cost01]: Race this follower. [fanfare] Reveal the top card of your deck. Deal X damage to each enemy leader and give your leader [defense]+X. X equals the revealed card's cost. [act][cost10]: Give this follower [attack]+10/[defense]+10.
Rush. Strike: If there are no other followers on your field, select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it and deal 3 damage to its leader.

At the start of the game, the player who goes second has 3 Evolution Points. You can use an Evolution Point toward paying an [evolve] or [feed] cost by flipping this card over so that the card back is showing. An Evolution Point is equal to 1 play point. (You can perform either [evolve] or [feed] once per turn. Only 1 Evolution Point can be used at a time.)
